seo.title: Care Staffing PSL Partnership London | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Add Vigil Care Staffing to your PSL and get priority access to qualified care staff plus free weekly planning tools built for CQC inspections, team wellbeing, and smoother…

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Care Staffing PSL Partnership
fields.sub: Add Vigil Care Staffing to your preferred-supplier list for priority access to vetted care-sector workers across Greater London.

image.alt: a blue and white document with white text

fields.image_alt: a blue and white document with white text

fields.heading: A dependable partner on your PSL
fields.body: Adding Vigil Care Staffing to your preferred-supplier list gives your service priority access to vetted, directly employed care workers across Greater London. You get a dedicated point of contact, help keeping your staffing records compliant, and staffing shaped around how your service actually runs. Whether you need regular cover or reliable support at short notice, a PSL partnership keeps the right people within easy reach.

image.alt: Vigil Care Staffing document titled Staffing Evidence Builder with a table of 12 quick wins and manager's notes.

fields.image_alt: Vigil Care Staffing document titled Staffing Evidence Builder with a table of 12 quick wins and manager's notes.

items.title: Dedicated Support
items.body: A named coordinator who understands your service and manages your bookings from start to finish.

items.title: Compliance Help
items.body: Clear vetting evidence and records that support safer staffing and help you prepare for CQC inspections.

items.title: Custom Staffing
items.body: Workers matched to your specialisms, routines and shift patterns, rather than a generic pool.

items.title: Free Workforce Tools
items.body: Access to practical planning tools that help you manage rotas and workforce needs more easily.

items.title: Rapid Cover
items.body: Priority response to short-notice rota gaps so your service stays safely staffed.

image.alt: Smiling woman with dark hair wearing a blue shirt and lanyard, standing with arms crossed indoors.

fields.image_alt: Smiling woman with dark hair wearing a blue shirt and lanyard, standing with arms crossed indoors.

fields.heading: How the partnership works
fields.body: Getting started is straightforward. We agree terms and add Vigil Care Staffing to your PSL, then take time to understand your service, your specialisms and your usual shift patterns. From there you can request cover whenever you need it, and we prioritise your bookings with vetted workers who become familiar faces over time. Throughout, we keep clear records and communicate promptly on every request.

image.alt: Vigil Care Staffing document titled Staffing Evidence Builder with a table of 12 quick wins for managers.

fields.image_alt: Vigil Care Staffing document titled Staffing Evidence Builder with a table of 12 quick wins for managers.

items.a: A preferred-supplier-list partnership means your service lists Vigil Care Staffing as an approved staffing supplier, giving you priority access to vetted care workers.
PSL partnerships cover care providers across Greater London, including central, north, south, east and west London.

items.q: What does it cost to join?
items.a: There is no charge to add Vigil Care Staffing to your PSL; you pay only for the cover you book.
Every worker completes enhanced DBS checks, right-to-work verification and reference checks, with mandatory safeguarding and infection-control training.

image.alt: Three healthcare workers in teal scrubs smile and laugh together while seated indoors.

fields.heading: Ready to add Vigil to your PSL?
fields.sub: Start a partnership and get priority access to vetted care staff across Greater London.
